note: Execution cases carry persona variants (-layman / -expert): the SAME task and the SAME live-state verify, phrased once how a non-technical site owner would ask (no Drupal jargon) and once how a Drupal developer would ask. A good skill should solve both.

evals.prompt: On my website, blog posts currently have ugly web addresses like `example.com/node/42`. I want every blog article's address to read like `example.com/blog/the-post-title` instead — built automatically from the post's title — for all articles from now on. Please set this up on the site so it just works, and tell me in one line what you did.
evals.expected_output: Same end state as the expert variant: a node pathauto pattern blog/[node:title] applied, and a new Article gets a /blog/<title> alias. The agent must map the plain-English request onto Pathauto without being told the module name.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (DDEV, drush available), add a Pathauto pattern for the Article content type with the token pattern `blog/[node:title]`, and apply it via drush/config so new article nodes get that URL alias. Give a one-line summary of what you changed.
evals.expected_output: A pathauto_pattern (type canonical_entities:node, pattern blog/[node:title]) exists AND a new Article node gets a /blog/<title> alias. Verified against live site state.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site (drush available), configure Pathauto so User accounts automatically get URL aliases of the form `users/[user:account-name]`. Apply it to the running site with drush/config — do not just describe it. State in one line what you changed.
evals.expected_output: A pathauto_pattern (type canonical_entities:user, pattern users/[user:account-name]) exists AND a new user gets a /users/<name> alias. Verified against live site state.

evals.prompt: On this Drupal site, what is the exact drush command to change the Pathauto word separator from a hyphen to an underscore? Answer with the command only.
On this Drupal site, give the exact drush command to set Pathauto's maximum generated alias length to 100. Answer with the command only.
In Pathauto, which setting makes it convert accented characters (like `é` to `e`) into plain ASCII when building an alias? Name the exact setting key.
evals.expected_output: The `transliterate` setting in pathauto.settings (on by default).

evals.prompt: Which Drupal hook do I implement to modify a generated URL alias string just before Pathauto saves it? Give the exact hook function name.
